name: Push To Deploy Proof
tagline: Proof that a git push auto-updates openaitpm.com within ~40 seconds, no human in the loop.
thesis: This page did not exist until a commit was pushed to machine0005-a11y/openaitpm. Vercel's GitHub integration detected the push, ran npm run build, and published it automatically. That is the whole openaitpm pipeline: code in, live URL out.
audience: Anyone verifying the continuous-deploy loop is real.
proofPoints: Created by a git push, not a manual upload.
Vercel auto-built and deployed it on push to main.
